title: epipactis viscosa
intro: Epipactis viscosa, also known as the sticky helleborine, is a type of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epipactis viscosa include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Epipactis viscosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
